greeting.line: Don't stare. You'll notice the differences, and then you won't sleep.
greeting.line_friendly: Oh. You came back to the glass. Most people don't.
greeting.line_hostile: You don't want to know which one of us is losing time.

options.text: Which of us is real in here?

mirror.line: I made the other choice. Every mirror is the version where you turned left. Press your hand to the glass and I'll show you what it cost.

real.line: In here it's ME who's real, and YOU knocking on the glass. Want to trade? One choice. That's all we are — one choice apart.

options.text: Keep your side of the glass.
